user_system_path: Issue #140 is the active Real Slack Self-Loop implementation seam. ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml must point at the same issue and the queue file must remain inactive/reference-only.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, .foldera-contract.json, and docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate the queue.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Current seam is the automatic Open Threads capture and lessons-learned recurrence enforcement patch: keep the Master Bible reference-only, point the repo at issue #168, and align source-truth, gate/test files, and PR template law without widening to product breadth.
forbidden_files_raw: No live Slack, no Supabase migrations or data mutation, no Vercel settings, no Stripe/auth/dashboard work, no package/dependency changes, no queue activation, no Dependabot, no live connector fetch, no paid/model call, no fake claims, and no broad cleanup outside the governance patch.
required_browser_proof: Not applicable; deterministic governance proof only.
acceptance_condition: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md, .foldera-contract.json, and the gate/test layer all agree that issue #140 is the active Real Slack Self-Loop implementation seam, issue #168 is completed/superseded, issue #182 is completed and closed, issue #165 is capture-only, and the queue file remains inactive/reference-only. No product/runtime implementation starts in this change.
stop_condition: Stop when the source-truth closeout and gate/test layer both accept issue #140 as active with issue #168 closed/completed and no queue activation.
browser_proof_command: not applicable - deterministic governance proof only
anti_regression_checks: issue #140 is the active Real Slack Self-Loop implementation seam

next_command: Continue the issue #140 Real Slack Self-Loop branch and keep issue #168 closed/completed until any future activation.
